d: The definitive guide (+500 lines) to mastering what happens in your CPU. Learn to read 'top', understand PIDs, kill zombies, and manage background processes.

d: Stop relying only on public resolvers. Run your own authoritative name server for internal networks: zones, A records, CNAME, and forwarders.
